summary: Completed comprehensive testing of About Us page for Dune Lubricants. All major features and navigation functionality working correctly.

Quality Assurance section with ISO Certified, In-House Laboratory, Batch Traceability items
Global Distribution Network section with all stats: 50+, 12h, 200k, 94%
